title: Super Copper announces $2 million brokered private placement
content:
* Super Copper (CSE: CUPR) (OTCQB: CUPPF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CUPPF]) said on Thursday it plans a brokered private placement to raise up to $2 million.
 	* The offering will consist of up to 2,666,666 units priced at $0.75 per unit, with each unit comprising one common share and one warrant to buy a share at $1.15 for 36 months. 
 	* The company said it intends to use the net proceeds to advance its Cordillera Cobre and Castilla copper projects in Chile toward drill-ready status and for general and administrative expenses.
 	* The offering is expected to close on or about March 5, 2026, subject to customary conditions and regulatory approvals.
 	* CUPPF closed -5.37% at $0.634.
 	* Source: Press Release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20416835-super-copper-announces-brokered-life-financing-of-2-million]
